properties.name: transcribing
properties.description: Transcription job is queued or running

properties.name: transcript_ready
properties.description: Transcript has been produced and persisted

properties.name: protocol_generating
properties.description: Protocol generation job is queued or running

properties.name: protocol_ready
properties.description: Protocol has been generated and persisted

properties.name: edited
properties.description: Protocol has been manually edited at least once; repeating state on each save

properties.name: failed
properties.description: Non-recoverable error in the transcription or generation pipeline

properties.name: queued
properties.description: Job created, waiting for a worker
